query:
INSERT INTO site_settings (settingKey, settingValue) VALUES 
('substack_url', 'https://open.substack.com/pub/jamesbell333289'),
('pastors_connection_url', 'https://pastorsconnectionnetwork.com')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE settingValue = VALUES(settingValue);
